headline: Sarawak Biomass Industry Targets RM8 Billion by 2028
context: Sarawak biomass industry generated RM3.2 billion in 2025 with state targeting RM8 billion by 2028 through waste processing.

cards.big: Sarawak biomass generated RM3.2 billion targeting RM8 billion by 2028
cards.sub: Palm oil waste and timber residue form base of state circular economy push

cards.big: 14 new biomass processing plants opened in Sarawak between 2023 and 2025
cards.sub: Combined capacity processes 4.8 million tonnes agricultural waste annually

cards.big: Biomass pellet exports to Japan and South Korea reached RM680 million in 2025
cards.sub: Both countries offer premium prices for certified sustainable biomass fuel

cards.big: Industry employs 12,000 workers but 60% are low-wage processing roles
cards.sub: Average biomass plant worker earns RM1,800 below manufacturing sector average

cards.big: Biomass growth tests whether circular economy creates quality jobs or just volume
RM8 billion biomass target by 2028. Sarawak's plantation waste becomes an industrial feedstock opportunity.
